title: Experimental Fashion Editorial Poster
sourceTitle: Experimental Fashion Editorial Ghost Scan Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical high-resolution experimental fashion editorial poster for optical memory trace, Vellum Atelier, and Ghost Trace. Subject: an adult high-fashion model with calm distant presence wears or presents sheer organza trench coat with sculptural chrome accessories with quiet restrained high-fashion presence, natural skin texture, clear silhouette, and rich material details. Scene: Large pale grey-white negative-space background with subtle paper grain, low-contrast noise, printed editorial texture, and cold minimal magazine atmosphere. Composition: Model placed slightly right of center in full-body or nearly full-body pose; a small paragraph about garments folded by light and memory appears as small restrained editorial copy; controlled ghost scan blur wraps edges while face or upper body stays clear as the emotional anchor. Signature Elements: Preserved experimental fashion editorial ghost scan poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-end cold minimal experimental fashion magazine poster, archive-like independent designer lookbook, avant-garde campaign, ghost scan blur, vertical motion trails, translucent afterimages, glitch displacement, and paper-texture memory drag. Color Palette: Low-saturation low-contrast cold palette based on the selected theme, pale grey-white background, subtle paper grain, muted material tones, and restrained editorial black typography. Lighting: Soft editorial light with clear face or upper-body anchor, subtle material shine, quiet shadows, and blur effects limited to garment edges, arms, shoes, or product edges. Restrictions: Keep the poster cold, minimal, premium, and experimental;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: Vertical high-resolution experimental fashion editorial poster for transparent product afterimage, Glass Vale, and Afterform Study. Subject:: Your Theme: Your Brand Name: Collection Title: Fashion Product Direction: Main Color Palette wears or presents transparent perfume object, sheer mesh coat, reflective shoes, and glass-distortion accessory with quiet restrained high-fashion presence, natural skin texture, clear silhouette, and rich material details. Scene: Large pale grey-white negative-space background with subtle paper grain, low-contrast noise, printed editorial texture, and cold minimal magazine atmosphere. Composition: Model placed slightly right of center in full-body or nearly full-body pose; small copy about product traces dissolving into paper grain appears as small restrained editorial copy; controlled ghost scan blur wraps edges while face or upper body stays clear as the emotional anchor. Signature Elements: Preserved experimental fashion editorial ghost scan poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-end cold minimal experimental fashion magazine poster, archive-like independent designer lookbook, avant-garde campaign, ghost scan blur, vertical motion trails, translucent afterimages, glitch displacement, and paper-texture memory drag. Color Palette: Low-saturation low-contrast cold palette based on the selected theme, pale grey-white background, subtle paper grain, muted material tones, and restrained editorial black typography. Lighting: Soft editorial light with clear face or upper-body anchor, subtle material shine, quiet shadows, and blur effects limited to garment edges, arms, shoes, or product edges. Restrictions: Keep the poster cold, minimal, premium, and experimental;
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.

imagePrompts.title: Experimental Fashion Editorial Ghost Scan Poster Variant 03

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical high-resolution experimental fashion editorial poster for memory-folded tailoring, Archive Line, and Soft Displacement. Subject: adult high-fashion model in a quiet full-body pose with upper body kept sharp wears or presents structured tailoring with translucent layers, crinkled fabric, and leather reflection with quiet restrained high-fashion presence, natural skin texture, clear silhouette, and rich material details. Scene: Large pale grey-white negative-space background with subtle paper grain, low-contrast noise, printed editorial texture, and cold minimal magazine atmosphere. Composition: Model placed slightly right of center in full-body or nearly full-body pose; short restrained paragraph about cloth scanned by memory and motion appears as small restrained editorial copy; controlled ghost scan blur wraps edges while face or upper body stays clear as the emotional anchor. Signature Elements: Preserved experimental fashion editorial ghost scan poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-end cold minimal experimental fashion magazine poster, archive-like independent designer lookbook, avant-garde campaign, ghost scan blur, vertical motion trails, translucent afterimages, glitch displacement, and paper-texture memory drag. Color Palette: Low-saturation low-contrast cold palette based on the selected theme, pale grey-white background, subtle paper grain, muted material tones, and restrained editorial black typography. Lighting: Soft editorial light with clear face or upper-body anchor, subtle material shine, quiet shadows, and blur effects limited to garment edges, arms, shoes, or product edges. Restrictions: Keep the poster cold, minimal, premium, and experimental;
